claim: Midnight defines three core JSON schemas: the Compact AST, transactions, and zero-knowledge proofs
The Proof definition type property is an enum with values groth16 and plonk
The ZK proof schema proofSystem property is an enum with values groth16, plonk, and halo2
The ZK proof schema curve property is an enum with values bn254 and bls12-381
The ZK proof proof object element b is an array of exactly 2 arrays of 2 strings representing a G2 point
The transaction schema hash property is of type string with pattern ^0x[a-fA-F0-9]{64}$
The transaction schema has required properties: version, hash, contractAddress, circuitName, inputs, proof, publicOutputs, stateChanges, timestamp, sender, nonce, fee
The Compact compiler produces ASTs conforming to the Compact AST schema
